title: brachyotum rugosum
intro: Brachyotum rugosum, also known as the 'Peruvian Angel's Trumpet', is a plant species belonging to the Bromeliad family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Andean medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Brachyotum rugosum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
